source: Stage 3-6 classification: raw reads for all rows; safe writes only for reviewed boolean toggle subset

Currently writable. Official source reads and compiles non-empty values as final screen fragment shader files. Path validation is not display/render safety proof; production apply now requires the screen-shader high-risk watchdog gate. Optional advisory glslangValidator integration is designable only as explicit-user-action, temp-copy-only, non-blocking, and non-authoritative; compile-aware validation remains deferred and standalone output is not Hyprland runtime safety proof.
Batch A boolean write enabled after temp-config parser/writer roundtrip and Hyprland --verify-config proof; active config/runtime mutation was not used.

Monitor output writes are enabled through a context-aware monitor-name validator. Empty/default is accepted; non-empty values must match monitor names parsed from current config monitor declarations. Hyprland verify-config accepts arbitrary monitor strings, so app-side source validation is required.
